ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of the image (e.g., JPEG, PNG) */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the image in pixels */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the image in pixels */,
  "date_taken" TEXT /* Date the image was taken */,
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* ID of the camera that took the image */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location where the image was taken */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the image (e.g., CCTV, drone, satellite) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for easy search and categorization */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the image in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cameras" (
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each camera */,
  "camera_name" TEXT /* Name of the camera */,
  "camera_type" TEXT /* Type of the camera (e.g., CCTV, drone, satellite) */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the camera (e.g., 1080p, 4K) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the camera */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the camera (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name or ID of the entity owning the camera */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("camera_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "detections" (
  "detection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detection */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the detection was made on */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object detection model used */,
  "object_type" INTEGER /* Type of object detected (e.g., person, vehicle, animal) */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence score of the detection */,
  "llx" INTEGER /* Lower-left x-coordinate of the bounding box */,
  "lly" INTEGER /* Lower-left y-coordinate of the bounding box */,
  "lrx" INTEGER /* Lower-right x-coordinate of the bounding box */,
  "lry" INTEGER /* Lower-right y-coordinate of the bounding box */,
  "ulx" INTEGER /* Upper-left x-coordinate of the bounding box */,
  "uly" INTEGER /* Upper-left y-coordinate of the bounding box */,
  "urx" INTEGER /* Upper-right x-coordinate of the bounding box */,
  "ury" INTEGER /* Upper-right y-coordinate of the bounding box */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model used for detection */,
  "detection_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the detection was made */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the detection in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_detections_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_detections_object_type FOREIGN KEY ("object_type") REFERENCES object_types ("object_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_detections_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., YOLO, SSD) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the model in JSON format */,
  "training_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training data used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the model */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_types" (
  "object_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object type */,
  "object_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the object type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the object type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the object type (e.g., living, non-living) */,
  "attributes" TEXT /* Attributes specific to the object type in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the user account */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "detection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the detection the annotation belongs to */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the annotation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_detection_id FOREIGN KEY ("detection_id") REFERENCES detections ("detection_id")
)
